Petition For Order Denying Distribution Of The Estate To Person Other Than The Beneficiary
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Continued To Dec-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Brandenburger & Davis (Objector). John Boessenecker for Dennis Giacopetti (Petitioner/Administrator of the Smith Estate). Jack Bonnano for Suzann Johnson (Special Administrator).

Mr. Boessenecker reported that the funds will go to the Michael Smith Estate in Nevada, that his client advanced $90,000.00, that it is a financial hardship and that he is requesting a preliminary distribution of 1/3. Mr. Conrad stated that Mr. Hogdges is ready to file the petition for final distribution. Mr. Bonnano requested that $20,000.00 be set aside for his fee request and that he has no other interest. The Court set the evidentiary hearing on all issues for December 21, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. The Court indicated the intent to grant the Preliminary Distribution, but wants to take another look and took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Bonnano appearing for Suzane Johnson, special administator. Lawarence Siracusa appearing for administrator Scott Hodges. Issues addressed. Petition For Order Removing Administrator; For Appointment Of Successor Administrator; For Surcharge Of Administrator And Her Surety; And For Award Of Damages And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Continued To Feb-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Boessenecker appearing for petitioner Dennis Giacopetti. Arthur Park appearing for Surety. John F. Bonanno and Robert Bowman appearing for administrator Alexis Giacopetti. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. The administrator agreed to resign and have a private fiduciary appointed. Mr. Boessencecker objected to have the Public Administrator appointed. Court will appoint Scott Hodges as the administrator with a petition. The administrator's powers are suspended. No withdrawl from the two bank accounts without court order. Matter is continued to 2/28 for status. The car can remain in Alexis' possession until 2/28.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
